sudo -u ec2-user bash -c 'cat > /tmp/chk.py <<PYEOF
import json
data = json.load(open("/home/ec2-user/platform/test.raw.json"))
targets = {433, 772, 456, 12, 325, 528, 385, 274, 703, 51}
for t in data:
    tid = t.get("task_id")
    if tid in targets:
        url = t.get("start_url") or ""
        sites = t.get("sites")
        print("task", tid, "sites=", sites, "url=", url[:120])
PYEOF
python3.11 /tmp/chk.py'
